zone_placement_rules.notes: house.pattern.md: both observed houses center their door -- unlike shop.pattern.md, this rule has no stated exception for houses. Do not offset the door in any House layout family.
Continuous run against the back wall, terminating at both side walls.
This tier keeps the accent on-centerline (or omitted), matching house.pattern.md's other observed house rather than the off-axis one -- see LAY-INTERIOR-HOUSE-OFFSET for that variant.

variants.notes: Map018.json's configuration: one flame at room-center.
Valid per house.pattern.md: the hearth_accent zone is optional, not every house needs one.

provenance.notes: Directly reproduces both observed samples' shared shell size, centered door, and back-wall shelf run. allow_reflection is false here (unlike Shop/Inn) because house.pattern.md explicitly states 'Do not force bilateral left/right symmetry the way shop.pattern.md recommends' -- there is no side-cluster mass to reflect.
